zh.lifeSummary: 當John Washborn Sr於1597年7月2日出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，他的父親John Washborne30歲，母親Martha Timbrell25歲。他於1618年11月23日與Margaret Moore在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1671年5月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Washborn Sr于1597年7月2日出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，他的父亲John Washborne30岁，母亲Martha Timbrell25岁。他于1618年11月23日与Margaret Moore在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1671年5月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Washborn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Washborn Sr was born on 2 July 1597, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Washborne, was 30 and his mother, Martha Timbrell, was 25. He married Margaret Moore on 23 November 1618, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 22 May 1671, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborn Sr è nato il il 2 luglio 1597 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Washborne, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Martha Timbrell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Moore il 23 novembre 1618, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 22 maggio 1671, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Washborn Srが1597年7月2日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John Washborneは30歳，母Martha Timbrellは25歳であった。1618年11月23日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでMargaret Mooreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1671年5月22日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Washborn Sr(이)가 1597년 7월 2일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Washborne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Timbrell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1618년 11월 23일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 Margaret Moore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1671년 5월 22일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborn Sr nasceu em 2 de julho de 1597, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Washborne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Martha Timbrell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Moore em 23 de novembro de 1618, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 22 de maio de 1671, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Washborn Sr родился 2 июля 1597 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Washborne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Timbrell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Moore 23 ноября 1618 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 22 май 1671 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Washborn Sr nació el 2 de julio de 1597, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Washborne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Martha Timbrell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Moore el 23 de noviembre de 1618, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 22 de mayo de 1671, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
